title: Artition's Font
description: A funny, cursed cipher font designed by Artition!
body:
# Artition's Font

A resource pack that replaces the default Minecraft font with a custom encrypted typeface originally designed by **Artition** for his ARG project. Recreated for Minecraft by **h4offc** and **ayvwato**.

## What it changes

The pack replaces the following characters with their encrypted equivalents:

- Russian and English letters
- Digits (0-9)
- Symbols: `!` `?` `.` `,` `:` `;` `-` `/`

## Why download it

If you enjoy ARG aesthetics, alternate reality games, or just want your game to look like it holds a secret, this pack delivers exactly that. Every line of text in chat, UI, and signs becomes part of the cipher.

Fair warning: this font was not designed with survival in mind. Reading anything will be a challenge.

## Notes

- The font was originally created by Artition for his ARG
- This Minecraft adaptation was made by h4offc and ayvwato with permission from the original author
- No gameplay mechanics are changed, only the font
